    {
      "action": "patch_file",
      "path": "res://project.godot",

      "content_ref": "FILE_5"

      "path": "res://src/scenes/fps_level.tscn",
      "content_ref": "FILE_6"

===FILE_1===
extends CharacterBody3D

@export var speed = 5.0
@export var jump_velocity = 4.5
@export var mouse_sensitivity = 0.002

@onready var camera = $Camera3D
@onready var weapon = $Camera3D/Weapon

var gravity = ProjectSettings.get_setting("physics/3d/default_gravity")

func _ready():
	Input.set_mouse_mode(Input.MOUSE_MODE_CAPTURED)

func _unhandled_input(event):
	if event is InputEventMouseMotion:
		rotate_y(-event.relative.x * mouse_sensitivity)
		camera.rotate_x(-event.relative.y * mouse_sensitivity)
		camera.rotation.x = clamp(camera.rotation.x, -PI/2, PI/2)
	if event.is_action_pressed("ui_cancel"):
		Input.set_mouse_mode(Input.MOUSE_MODE_VISIBLE)

func _physics_process(delta):
	if not is_on_floor():
		velocity.y -= gravity * delta

	if Input.is_action_just_pressed("jump") and is_on_floor():
		velocity.y = jump_velocity

	var input_dir = Input.get_vector("move_left", "move_right", "move_forward", "move_back")
	var direction = (transform.basis * Vector3(input_dir.x, 0, input_dir.y)).normalized()
	if direction:
		velocity.x = direction.x * speed
		velocity.z = direction.z * speed
	else:
		velocity.x = move_toward(velocity.x, 0, speed)
		velocity.z = move_toward(velocity.z, 0, speed)

	move_and_slide()

	if Input.is_action_just_pressed("shoot"):
		if weapon:
			weapon.shoot()
===END_FILE_1===
===FILE_2===
extends Node3D

@export var damage = 25
@export var fire_rate = 0.1
@export var max_ammo = 30
@export var reload_time = 1.5

var current_ammo = max_ammo
var is_reloading = false
var time_since_last_shot = 0.0

@onready var raycast = $Raycast3D

func _ready():
	current_ammo = max_ammo

func _process(delta):
	if is_reloading:
		time_since_last_shot += delta
		if time_since_last_shot >= reload_time:
			is_reloading = false
			current_ammo = max_ammo
			print("Перезарядка завершена")
	else:
		time_since_last_shot += delta

func shoot():
	if is_reloading or current_ammo <= 0:
		if current_ammo <= 0 and not is_reloading:
			reload()
		return

	if time_since_last_shot >= fire_rate:
		time_since_last_shot = 0.0
		current_ammo -= 1
		print("Выстрел! Осталось патронов: ", current_ammo)
		
		raycast.force_raycast_update()
		if raycast.is_colliding():
			var collider = raycast.get_collider()
			if collider.has_method("take_damage"):
				collider.take_damage(damage)

func reload():
	if not is_reloading and current_ammo < max_ammo:
		is_reloading = true
		time_since_last_shot = 0.0
		print("Перезарядка...")
===END_FILE_2===
===FILE_3===
extends CharacterBody3D

@export var speed = 3.0
@export var detection_range = 10.0
@export var attack_range = 8.0
@export var fire_rate = 1.0
@export var health = 100

var is_alive = true
var time_since_last_shot = 0.0
var player = null

@onready var raycast = $Raycast3D

func _ready():
	add_to_group("enemy")
	var players = get_tree().get_nodes_in_group("player")
	if players.size() > 0:
		player = players[0]

func _physics_process(delta):
	if not is_alive or not player:
		return

	var distance_to_player = global_position.distance_to(player.global_position)
	
	if distance_to_player <= detection_range:
		look_at(Vector3(player.global_position.x, global_position.y, player.global_position.z))
		
		if distance_to_player <= attack_range:
			time_since_last_shot += delta
			if time_since_last_shot >= fire_rate:
				time_since_last_shot = 0.0
				_attack()
		else:
			var direction = (player.global_position - global_position).normalized()
			velocity = direction * speed
			move_and_slide()
	else:
		velocity = Vector3.ZERO

func _attack():
	raycast.force_raycast_update()
	if raycast.is_colliding():
		var collider = raycast.get_collider()
		if collider.is_in_group("player") and collider.has_method("take_damage"):
			collider.take_damage(10)
		elif collider.is_in_group("player"):
			print("Враг попал в игрока!")

func take_damage(amount):
	if not is_alive:
		return
	health -= amount
	print("Враг получил урон: ", amount, " Здоровье: ", health)
	if health <= 0:
		die()

func die():
	is_alive = false
	velocity = Vector3.ZERO
	print("Враг уничтожен")
	queue_free()
===END_FILE_3===
===FILE_4===
[gd_scene load_steps=4 format=3]

[ext_resource type="Script" path="res://src/scripts/player/fps_controller.gd" id="1_ctrl"]
[ext_resource type="Script" path="res://src/scripts/player/weapon.gd" id="2_wep"]

[sub_resource type="CapsuleShape3D" id="CapsuleShape3D_player"]
radius = 0.4
height = 1.8

[node name="Player" type="CharacterBody3D"]
groups = ["player"]
script = ExtResource("1_ctrl")

[node name="CollisionShape3D" type="CollisionShape3D" parent="."]
shape = SubResource("CapsuleShape3D_player")

[node name="Camera3D" type="Camera3D" parent="."]
